title: Rouen, Normandy — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rouen, Normandy: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rouen is a city in Normandy with a population of 112,000. The historic capital of Normandy with a magnificent Gothic cathedral, medieval half-timbered streets, and Joan of Arc history.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
